Implicit Types f : flow.

Implicit Types u : ufun.

forall (H : hprop) f1 f2,
req H f1;; f2 ⊑ req H (f1;; f2)


forall (H : hprop) f1 f2,
req H f1;; f2 ⊑ req H (f1;; f2)

  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (req H f1;; f2) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req H (f1;; f2)

|= req H (f1;; f2)

forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ (H1 \* H2) ⊑ ens_ H1;; ens_ H2


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ (H1 \* H2) ⊑ ens_ H1;; ens_ H2

  
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap)
  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)
 apply satisfies_ens_ens_void_split.
Qed.


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ H1;; ens_ H2 ⊑ ens_ (H1 \* H2)


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ H1;; ens_ H2 ⊑ ens_ (H1 \* H2)

  unfold entails; apply satisfies_ens_ens_void_combine.
Qed.

Fmap.read s x = uf -> s ⊢ unk x a ⊑ uf a

forall f fk fk1,
shift_free f ->
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x
⊑ let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x


forall f fk fk1,
shift_free f ->
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x
⊑ let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x

  
forall f fk fk1,
shift_free f ->
forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x)
 
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x)

  
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= (let x = f in fk x)
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= fk1 v
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x)
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fk0: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H6: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0
|= (let x = f in fk x)
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let x = fk0 r1 in fk1 x)
|= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x)

 applys* s_bind_sh.
    
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fb: flow
k: var
fk2: val -> flow
H4: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk2 |= f
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb
  (fun r1 => let x = let x = fk2 r1 in fk x in fk1 x)
|= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x)
 (* we are stuck as entails does not let us
      reassociate the continuation *)
      false Hsf H4. }
Qed.


forall f fk fk1,
shift_free f ->
let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x
⊑ let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x

|= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x)

  (fun r1 => let r = fk0 r1 in let x = fk r in fk1 x)
|= (let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x)

    false Hsf H6. }

forall f1 f2 f3,
shift_free f1 -> f1;; f2;; f3 ⊑ (f1;; f2);; f3


forall f1 f2 f3,
shift_free f1 -> f1;; f2;; f3 ⊑ (f1;; f2);; f3

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
Hsf1: shift_free f1
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; f2;; f3)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  applys* norm_bind_assoc_sf_conv.
Qed.


forall f1 f2 f3,
shift_free f1 -> (f1;; f2);; f3 ⊑ f1;; f2;; f3

shift_free f1 -> (f1;; f2);; f3 ⊑ f1;; f2;; f3

Hsf1: shift_free f1
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; f2;; f3)

  applys* norm_bind_assoc_sf.
Qed.

bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)

h1, h2: heap

f1, f2, f3: flow
Hsf1: shift_free f1
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s1, s2: senv
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; f2;; f3)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)
 applys* norm_seq_assoc1 H.
  
f1, f2, f3: flow
Hsf1: shift_free f1
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s1, s2: senv
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; f2;; f3)
 applys* norm_seq_assoc2 H.
Qed.
Compare with norm_bind_assoc_sf.
Where we apply the IH shows where we need to reassociate the continuation. When the other arguments have shifts, we don't actually need to reassociate.
Consider how these evaluate:
Sh(...); f2; f3 ⊑ (Sh(...); f2); f3
L: shft(..., λ x. id; f2; f3) R: shft(..., λ x. (id; f2); f3)

let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n
let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x

f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var) (fb : flow) fk0,
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0
|= (let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x) ->
exists (fb1 : flow) fk2,
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk2
  |= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v, fk0 v ⊆ n fk2 v)

IHn: forall f fk fk1,
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x

s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk0: val -> flow
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0
|= (let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x)
exists (fb1 : flow) fk2,
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk2
  |= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v, fk0 v ⊆ n fk2 v)

v: val

exists (fb1 : flow) fk2,
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk2
  |= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v, fk0 v ⊆ n fk2 v)
n: nat
IHn: forall f fk fk1,
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk2: val -> flow
H5: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk2
|= (let x = f in fk x)
exists (fb1 : flow) fk3,
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk3
  |= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\
  (forall v, let x = fk2 v in fk1 x ⊆ n fk3 v)

    
n: nat
IHn: forall f fk fk1,
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk0: val -> flow
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= (let x = f in fk x)
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, shft k fb fk0 |= fk1 v
exists (fb1 : flow) fk2,
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk2
  |= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v, fk0 v ⊆ n fk2 v)

H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, shft k fb fk0 |= fk1 v
s0: senv
h0: heap
v0: val
H6: s1, s0, h1, h0, norm v0 |= f
H9: s0, s3, h0, h3, norm v |= fk v0
exists (fb1 : flow) fk2,
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk2
  |= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v, fk0 v ⊆ n fk2 v)

|= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) /\
(fb ⊆ n fb) /\ (forall v, fk0 v ⊆ n fk0 v)

n: nat
IHn: forall f fk fk1,
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x
f: flow

s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk0: val -> flow

h3: heap

s0: senv
h0: heap
v0: val
H6: s1, s0, h1, h0, norm v0 |= f
H9: s0, s3, h0, h3, norm v |= fk v0
s0, s2, h0, h2, shft k fb fk0
|= (let x = fk v0 in fk1 x)

        applys* s_bind.

|= (let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x) /\
(fb ⊆ n fb) /\
(forall v0, let x = fk2 v0 in fk1 x ⊆ n ?fk1 v0)

forall v,
let x = fk2 v in fk1 x ⊆ n
(fun r1 => let x = fk2 r1 in fk1 x) v
 reflexivity.

H4: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0 |= f
forall v,
let x = let x = fk0 v in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n
(fun r1 => let r = fk0 r1 in let x = fk r in fk1 x) v
 
n: nat
IHn: forall f fk fk1,
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x

fk, fk1: val -> flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk0: val -> flow
H4: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0 |= f
v: val
let x = let x = fk0 v in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n
(fun r1 => let r = fk0 r1 in let x = fk r in fk1 x) v
 
n: nat
IHn: forall f fk fk1,
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow

h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow

v: val
let x = let x = fk0 v in fk x in fk1 x ⊆ n
let r = fk0 v in let x = fk r in fk1 x
 applys IHn. } } }
Qed.

(* A pure fact about a result on the left of a seq doesn't contribute anything *)

  norm v = norm v0 /\

  h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
s3, s2, h1, h2, R |= f
 heaps.
Qed.

(* Lemma ent_seq_ens_dep_l : forall env f f1 p,
  (forall r1, p r1 -> entails_under env env f1 f) ->
  entails_under env env (ens (fun r => \[p r]);; f1) f.
Proof.
  unfold entails_under. intros.
  inverts H0 as H0; no_shift. destr H0.
  inverts H0 as H0. destr H0.
  hinv H0. injects H1. subst.
  rew_fmap *.
Qed. *)

R = norm v /\
(Q v \* H) (h4 \u x0) /\
h2 = h1 \u h4 \u x0 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 (h4 \u x0)

    
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s2: senv
h3: heap
v0: val
h0, x, x0: heap
H0: v0 = vunit
H7: x = Fmap.empty
H3: H x0
H5: Fmap.disjoint x x0
H6: h0 = x \u x0
H2: h3 = h1 \u h0
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
v: val
h4: heap
H1: R = norm v
H8: Q v h4
H9: h2 = h3 \u h4
H11: Fmap.disjoint h3 h4
(Q v \* H) (h4 \u x0)

h1: heap

x0: heap

    apply* hstar_intro.

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s1, s2: senv

forall (H1 H2 : hprop) f,
req H1 (req H2 f) ⊑ req (H1 \* H2) f


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) f,
req H1 (req H2 f) ⊑ req (H1 \* H2) f

  
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) f s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap)
  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req H1 (req H2 f) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req (H1 \* H2) f

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req H1 (req H2 f)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req (H1 \* H2) f

  (* contravariance means we start reasoning from the assumptions in the goal *)
  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req H1 (req H2 f)
forall hp hr : heap,
(H1 \* H2) hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req H1 (req H2 f)
hb, hr: heap
(H1 \* H2) hb ->
h1 = hr \u hb ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hb -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f
 
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req H1 (req H2 f)
hb, hr: heap
H0: (H1 \* H2) hb
H3: h1 = hr \u hb
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hb
s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req H1 (req H2 f)
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap
H0: H1 hH1
H5: H2 hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint hH1 hH2
H7: hb = hH1 \u hH2
H3: h1 = hr \u hb
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hb
s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f


  (* start reasoning forward *)
  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap
H0: H1 hH1
H5: H2 hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint hH1 hH2
H7: hb = hH1 \u hH2
H3: h1 = hr \u hb
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hb
H14: forall hp hr : heap,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp -> Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= req H2 f
s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap
H0: H1 hH1
H5: H2 hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint hH1 hH2
H7: hb = hH1 \u hH2
H3: h1 = hr \u hb
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hb
H14: forall hp hr : heap,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp -> Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= req H2 f
h1 = (hr \u hH2) \u hH1
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap
H0: H1 hH1
H5: H2 hH2

H7: hb = hH1 \u hH2

H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp -> Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= req H2 f

H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp -> Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= req H2 f
H: s1, s2, hr \u hH2, h2, R |= req H2 f

H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap
H0: H1 hH1
H5: H2 hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint hH1 hH2
H7: hb = hH1 \u hH2
H3: h1 = hr \u hb
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hb

H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp -> Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= req H2 f

H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap

H5: H2 hH2

H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp -> Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= req H2 f
H16: forall hp hr0 : heap,
H2 hp ->
hr \u hH2 = hr0 \u hp -> Fmap.disjoint hr0 hp -> s1, s2, hr0, h2, R |= f
s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f

  specializes H16 hr H5.
Qed.


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) f,
req (H1 \* H2) f ⊑ req H1 (req H2 f)


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) f,
req (H1 \* H2) f ⊑ req H1 (req H2 f)

  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req (H1 \* H2) f ->

f: flow

h1, h2: heap
R: result

f: flow

forall hp hr : heap,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= req H2 f

  
H1, H2: hprop

h1 = hH2r \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hH2r hH1 ->

hH2r = hr \u hp ->

(H1 \* H2) hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f

f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap

Fmap.disjoint hr (hH1 \u hH2) ->

f: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
hH1, hH2r: heap
H0: H1 hH1
H3: h1 = hH2r \u hH1

(* This is not very useful for rewriting.
  The sequent form [ent_req_req] is more interesting. *)

R: result

H2 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f2
 
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),

H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),

hp, hr: heap

H: H2 ==> H1

hp, hr: heap

H1 hp -> h1 = hr \u hp -> Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f1
s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= f2

  specializes H14 hr H4.
Qed.

k: var
H6: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= f1
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let _ = fk r1 in (∀ x : A, f x))
|= (∀ x : A, f1;; f x)
 false Hsf H6.

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∀ x : A, f1;; f x)

req H (∀ b : A, fctx b) ⊑ ∀ b : A, req H (fctx b)

req H (∀ b : A, fctx b) ⊑ ∀ b : A, req H (fctx b)

  (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req H (∀ b : A, fctx b) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∀ b : A, req H (fctx b))

b: A
forall hp hr : heap,
H hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= fctx b

H hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->

b: A

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (fctx b;; f1)

    applys* s_seq.

|= (∃ b : A, fctx b;; f1)

A: Type
fctx: A -> flow
H: shift_free f1
H1: forall (A : Type) (ctx : A -> flow),
rs (∃ x : A, ctx x) ⊑ ∃ x : A, rs (ctx x)
rs (∃ x : A, f1;; fctx x) ⊑ ∃ b : A, rs (f1;; fctx b)

  specializes H1 A (fun b => f1;; fctx b).
Qed.

forall (H : hprop) (Q : postcond) f,
bientails ((ens r. Q r);; ens_ H;; f)
  (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r);; f)


forall (H : hprop) (Q : postcond) f,
bientails ((ens r. Q r);; ens_ H;; f)
  (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r);; f)

  
H: hprop
Q: postcond
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s1, s2: senv
H0: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= ((ens r. Q r);; ens_ H;; f)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r);; f)

Q: postcond

R: result
s1, s2: senv
H0: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r);; f)

Q: postcond

Q: postcond
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
R: result

h3: heap
v: val

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r);; f)
H: hprop
Q: postcond
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
s1, s2: senv
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H7: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= (ens r. Q r)
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let _ = fk r1 in ens_ H;; f)
|= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r);; f)
 
H: hprop
Q: postcond
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
s1, s2: senv
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H7: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= (ens r. Q r)

|= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r);; f)
 
H: hprop
Q: postcond
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H6: exists v (h3 : heap),
  shft k fb fk = norm v /\
  Q v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let _ = fk r1 in ens_ H;; f)

forall f fk v,
shift_free f ->
det f -> flow_res f v -> let x = f in fk x ⊑ f;; fk v

shift_free f ->
det f -> flow_res f v -> let x = f in fk x ⊑ f;; fk v

  
forall f fk v,
shift_free f ->
det f ->
(forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= f) ->
forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = f in fk x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; fk v)

fk: val -> flow
v: val
Hsf: shift_free f
Hd: det f
Hfr: forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap), s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= f

h1, h2: heap
R: result

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; fk v)

v0: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v0 |= f

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; fk v)

shift_free f ->

shift_free f ->
flow_res1 f v ->
forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = f in fk x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; fk v)

R: result

s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v0: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v0 |= f
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= fk v0
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; fk v)
f: flow
fk: val -> flow
v: val
Hsf: shift_free f
Hfr: flow_res1 f v
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fk0: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H6: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0 |= f
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let x = fk0 r1 in fk x)
|= (f;; fk v)

Hfr: flow_res1 f v

fk0: val -> flow

shft k fb (fun r1 => let x = fk0 r1 in fk x)
|= (f;; fk v)
 false Hsf H6.

f: flow
fk: val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f

  applys* s_seq H7.
Qed.
Similar to norm_seq_assoc. We only need one shift_free premise here because we're rewriting only in one direction. 
forall fk f1 f2,
shift_free f1 ->
let x = f1;; f2 in fk x ⊑ f1;; let x = f2 in fk x


forall fk f1 f2,
shift_free f1 ->
let x = f1;; f2 in fk x ⊑ f1;; let x = f2 in fk x

  
forall fk f1 f2,
shift_free f1 ->
forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = f1;; f2 in fk x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; let x = f2 in fk x)

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; let x = f2 in fk x)

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; let x = f2 in fk x)

forall fk v, let x = ens r. \[r = v] in fk x ⊑ fk v


forall fk v, let x = ens r. \[r = v] in fk x ⊑ fk v

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = ens r. \[r = v] in fk x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= fk v

(* TODO something more general would be to push disjunction out *)

forall fk v1 v2,
let x = ens r. \[r = v1 \/ r = v2] in fk x
⊑ disj (fk v1) (fk v2)


forall fk v1 v2,
let x = ens r. \[r = v1 \/ r = v2] in fk x
⊑ disj (fk v1) (fk v2)

  
forall fk v1 v2 s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let x = ens r. \[r = v1 \/ r = v2] in fk x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= disj (fk v1) (fk v2)

v1, v2: val
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let x = ens r. \[r = v1 \/ r = v2] in fk x)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= disj (fk v1) (fk v2)

v1, v2: val
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap

h3: heap
v: val

|= (ens r. \[r = v1 \/ r = v2])
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= fk v
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= disj (fk v1) (fk v2)

|= (ens r. \[r = v1 \/ r = v2])
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let x = fk0 r1 in fk x)
|= disj (fk v1) (fk v2)

s1, s2, h1, h2,

 false sf_ens H6.

(* Lemma norm_bind_pure : forall fk (P:val->Prop) Q,
  entails (bind (ens (fun r => \[P r])) (fun v => ens (Q)))
    (ens (fun r => Q r * \[P r])).
Proof.
  unfold entails. intros * H.
  inverts H. 2: { false sf_ens H6. }
  inverts H7. destr H5. injects H. hinv H0. subst. rew_fmap.
  assumption.
Qed. *)


forall fk (H : hprop),
let x = ens_ H in fk x ⊑ ens_ H;; fk vunit


forall fk (H : hprop),
let x = ens_ H in fk x ⊑ ens_ H;; fk vunit

  
forall fk (H : hprop) s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap)
  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = ens_ H in fk x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; fk vunit)

s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let x = fk0 r1 in fk x)
|= (ens_ H0;; fk vunit)

  norm v = norm v0 /\
  (\[v0 = vunit] \* H0) h4 /\

H1: norm v = norm v0
x, x0: heap

fk: val -> flow

forall (H : hprop) f fk,
let x = req H f in fk x ⊑ req H (let x = f in fk x)

f1;; disj f2 f3 ⊑ disj (f1;; f2) (f1;; f3)

forall (H : hprop) (P : Prop),
ens_ H;; ens_ \[P] ⊑ ens_ \[P];; ens_ H


forall (H : hprop) (P : Prop),
ens_ H;; ens_ \[P] ⊑ ens_ \[P];; ens_ H

  
forall (H : hprop) (P : Prop) s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap)
  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; ens_ \[P]) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)
 
H: hprop
P: Prop
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H0: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; ens_ \[P])
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)

  
H: hprop
P: Prop
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H8: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= ens_ H
H9: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= ens_ \[P]
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)
H: hprop
P: Prop
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H7: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= ens_ H
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let _ = fk r1 in ens_ \[P])
|= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)
 
H: hprop
P: Prop
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H8: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= ens_ H
H9: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= ens_ \[P]
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)

  
H: hprop
P: Prop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H9: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= ens_ \[P]
H6: exists v0 (h4 : heap),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  (\[v0 = vunit] \* H) h4 /\
  h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
s3, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)

  
H: hprop
P: Prop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
h3: heap
v: val
H6: exists v0 (h4 : heap),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  (\[v0 = vunit] \* H) h4 /\
  h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
H7: exists v (h4 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \[P]) h4 /\
  h2 = h3 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h3 h4
s2, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)

  applys s_seq; applys s_ens; heaps.
Qed.


forall (A : Type) (fk1 : A -> flow) fk,
let x = ∀ b : A, fk1 b in fk x
⊑ ∀ b : A, let x = fk1 b in fk x

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∀ b : A, let x = fk1 b in fk x)

s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let x = fk0 r1 in fk x)
|= (∀ b : A, let x = fk1 b in fk x)

forall (A : Type) f (fk : A -> val -> flow),
shift_free f ->
let r = f in (∀ x : A, fk x r)
⊑ ∀ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0


forall (A : Type) f (fk : A -> val -> flow),
shift_free f ->
let r = f in (∀ x : A, fk x r)
⊑ ∀ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0

shift_free f ->
forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let r = f in (∀ x : A, fk x r)) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∀ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)

f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let r = f in (∀ x : A, fk x r))
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∀ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)

h3: heap

H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= (∀ x : A, fk x v)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∀ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)

fk0: val -> flow

s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb
  (fun r1 => let r = fk0 r1 in (∀ x : A, fk x r))
|= (∀ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)

  (fun r1 => let r = fk0 r1 in (∀ x : A, fk x r))
|= (∀ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)
 false Hsf H6.

forall (A : Type) f (fk : A -> val -> flow),
shift_free f ->
let r = f in (∃ x : A, fk x r)
⊑ ∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0


forall (A : Type) f (fk : A -> val -> flow),
shift_free f ->
let r = f in (∃ x : A, fk x r)
⊑ ∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0

  
forall (A : Type) f (fk : A -> val -> flow),
shift_free f ->
forall s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let r = f in (∃ x : A, fk x r)) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)
 
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (let r = f in (∃ x : A, fk x r))
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)

  
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= f
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= (∃ x : A, fk x v)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fk0: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H6: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0 |= f
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb
  (fun r1 => let r = fk0 r1 in (∃ x : A, fk x r))
|= (∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)
 
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fk0: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H6: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0 |= f
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb
  (fun r1 => let r = fk0 r1 in (∃ x : A, fk x r))
|= (∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)
 false Hsf H6. 
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= f
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= (∃ x : A, fk x v)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)

  
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= f
H5: exists b : A, s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= fk b v
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ x : A, let x0 = f in fk x x0)

  
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= f
H5: exists b : A, s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= fk b v
exists b : A,
  s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = f in fk b x)
 
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= f
b: A
H: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= fk b v
exists b : A,
  s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = f in fk b x)
 
A: Type
f: flow
fk: A -> val -> flow
Hsf: shift_free f
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= f
b: A
H: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= fk b v
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = f in fk b x)
 apply* s_bind.
Qed.

(* This is like folding, but we can use unification to avoid specifying
  the pattern to fold against *)

forall f1 f2, let _ = f1 in f2 ⊑ f1;; f2


forall f1 f2, let _ = f1 in f2 ⊑ f1;; f2

  
f1, f2: flow
let _ = f1 in f2 ⊑ f1;; f2

  
f1, f2: flow
f1;; f2 ⊑ f1;; f2

  reflexivity.
Qed.


forall (P : val -> Prop) (P1 : Prop),
ens r. \[P1 /\ P r] ⊑ ens_ \[P1];; (ens r. \[P r])


forall (P : val -> Prop) (P1 : Prop),
ens r. \[P1 /\ P r] ⊑ ens_ \[P1];; (ens r. \[P r])

  
forall (P : val -> Prop) (P1 : Prop) s1 s2
  (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens r. \[P1 /\ P r]) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P1];; (ens r. \[P r]))
 
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens r. \[P1 /\ P r])
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P1];; (ens r. \[P r]))

  
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H6: exists v (h3 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  \[P1 /\ P v] h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P1];; (ens r. \[P r]))

  
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
H4: P1
H5: P v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
s2, s2, h1, h1, norm v
|= (ens_ \[P1];; (ens r. \[P r]))

  
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
H4: P1
H5: P v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
s2, ?s3, h1, ?h3, norm ?r1 |= ens_ \[P1]
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
H4: P1
H5: P v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
?s3, s2, ?h3, h1, norm v |= (ens r. \[P r])

  
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
H4: P1
H5: P v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
exists h3 : heap,
  \[P1] h3 /\ ?h3 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
H4: P1
H5: P v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
s2, s2, ?h3, h1, norm v |= (ens r. \[P r])
 
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
H4: P1
H5: P v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
s2, s2, h1, h1, norm v |= (ens r. \[P r])

  
P: val -> Prop
P1: Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
H4: P1
H5: P v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
exists v0 (h3 : heap),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  \[P v0] h3 /\ h1 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 heaps.
Qed.


forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop),
ens_ (\[P] \* H) ⊑ ens_ \[P];; ens_ H


forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop),
ens_ (\[P] \* H) ⊑ ens_ \[P];; ens_ H

  
forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap)
  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= ens_ (\[P] \* H) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)

H: hprop
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H0: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= ens_ (\[P] \* H)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)

  
P: Prop
H: hprop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H7: exists v (h3 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \[P] \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ \[P];; ens_ H)

H: hprop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap

  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2, ?s3, h1, ?h3, norm ?r1 |= ens_ \[P]

h1, h2: heap

  (\[v = vunit] \* \[P] \* H) h3 /\

?s3, s2, ?h3, h2, R |= ens_ H

s2: senv

  R = norm v /\

  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2, ?s3, h1, ?h3, norm ?r1 |= ens_ \[P]

H: hprop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H7: exists v (h3 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \[P] \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists h3 : heap,
  \[P] h3 /\ ?h3 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 heaps.

H: hprop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H7: exists v (h3 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \[P] \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2, s2, h1, h2, R |= ens_ H
 
P: Prop
H: hprop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H7: exists v (h3 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \[P] \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists v (h3 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 heaps.
Qed.

s2, s2, h1, h2, R |= ens_ H

forall (A : Type) (P : A -> val -> Prop),
ens r. \[exists b : A, P b r]
⊑ ∃ b : A, (ens r. \[P b r])


forall (A : Type) (P : A -> val -> Prop),
ens r. \[exists b : A, P b r]
⊑ ∃ b : A, (ens r. \[P b r])

  
forall (A : Type) (P : A -> val -> Prop) s1 s2
  (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens r. \[exists b : A, P b r]) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ b : A, (ens r. \[P b r]))
 
A: Type
P: A -> val -> Prop
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (ens r. \[exists b : A, P b r])
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ b : A, (ens r. \[P b r]))

  
A: Type
P: A -> val -> Prop
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H6: exists v (h3 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  \[exists b : A, P b v] h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ b : A, (ens r. \[P b r]))

  
A: Type
P: A -> val -> Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
b: A
H4: P b v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
s2, s2, h1, h1, norm v |= (∃ b : A, (ens r. \[P b r]))

  
A: Type
P: A -> val -> Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
b: A
H4: P b v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
exists b : A,
  s2, s2, h1, h1, norm v |= (ens r. \[P b r])
 
A: Type
P: A -> val -> Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
b: A
H4: P b v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
s2, s2, h1, h1, norm v |= (ens r. \[P b r])

  
A: Type
P: A -> val -> Prop
s2: senv
h1: heap
v: val
b: A
H4: P b v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
exists v0 (h3 : heap),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  \[P b v0] h3 /\ h1 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  heaps.
Qed.


forall s (f : var) u,
~ Fmap.indom s f -> s ⊢ defun f u;; discard f ⊑ empty


forall s (f : var) u,
~ Fmap.indom s f -> s ⊢ defun f u;; discard f ⊑ empty

  
forall s (f : var) u,
~ Fmap.indom s f ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) s2 (R : result),
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (defun f u;; discard f) ->
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= empty
 
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
H0: s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (defun f u;; discard f)
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= empty

  
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H8: s, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= defun f u
H9: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= discard f
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= empty
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H7: s, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= defun f u
s, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 => let _ = fk r1 in discard f)
|= empty
 
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H8: s, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= defun f u
H9: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= discard f
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= empty

  
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
h3: heap
H9: Fmap.update s f u, s2, h3, h2, R |= discard f
H7: ~ Fmap.indom s f
s, s2, h3, h2, R |= empty

  
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
h2: heap
H7: ~ Fmap.indom s f
s, Fmap.remove (Fmap.update s f u) f, h2, h2,
norm vunit |= empty

  
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
h2: heap
H7: ~ Fmap.indom s f
s, s, h2, h2, norm vunit |= empty

  applys empty_intro.
Qed.


forall (f : var) u, defun f u;; discard f ⊑ empty


forall (f : var) u, defun f u;; discard f ⊑ empty

  
forall (f : var) u s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= empty

u: ufun

h1, h2: heap
R: result

f: var
u: ufun

R: result

v: val
H7: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= defun f u
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= discard f

H8: Fmap.update s1 f u, s2, h3, h2, R |= discard f

s1, s2, h3, h2, R |= empty

u: ufun
s1: senv

H6: ~ Fmap.indom s1 f
s1, Fmap.remove (Fmap.update s1 f u) f, h2, h2,

forall s (f : var) u f1,
~ Fmap.indom s f ->
s ⊢ defun f u;; discard f;; f1 ⊑ f1


forall s (f : var) u f1,
~ Fmap.indom s f ->
s ⊢ defun f u;; discard f;; f1 ⊑ f1

  
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
f1: flow
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
s ⊢ defun f u;; discard f;; f1 ⊑ f1

  
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
f1: flow
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
s ⊢ (defun f u;; discard f);; f1 ⊑ f1

  
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
f1: flow
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
s ⊢ empty;; f1 ⊑ f1

  
s: senv
f: var
u: ufun
f1: flow
H: ~ Fmap.indom s f
s ⊢ f1 ⊑ f1

  reflexivity.
Qed.

u: ufun
f1: flow
defun f u;; discard f;; f1 ⊑ f1

  
f: var
u: ufun
f1: flow
(defun f u;; discard f);; f1 ⊑ f1

  
f: var
u: ufun
f1: flow
empty;; f1 ⊑ f1

  
f: var
u: ufun
f1: flow
f1 ⊑ f1

  reflexivity.
Qed.


forall (f : var) u (H : hprop),
defun f u;; ens_ H ⊑ ens_ H;; defun f u


forall (f : var) u (H : hprop),
defun f u;; ens_ H ⊑ ens_ H;; defun f u

  
forall (f : var) u (H : hprop) s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap)
  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (defun f u;; ens_ H) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; defun f u)
 
f: var
u: ufun
H: hprop
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H0: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (defun f u;; ens_ H)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; defun f u)

defun f u;; req H f1 ⊑ req H (defun f u;; f1)

H hp ->
h3 = hr \u hp ->

forall f1 f2 (f : var) u,
defun f u;; disj f1 f2
⊑ disj (defun f u;; f1) (defun f u;; f2)


forall f1 f2 (f : var) u,
defun f u;; disj f1 f2
⊑ disj (defun f u;; f1) (defun f u;; f2)

  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (defun f u;; disj f1 f2) ->

|= disj (defun f u;; f1) (defun f u;; f2)

|= disj (defun f u;; f1) (defun f u;; f2)

s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= disj (defun f u;; f1) (defun f u;; f2)

|= disj (defun f u;; f1) (defun f u;; f2)

  (\[v = vunit] \* \[P]) h4 /\
  h0 = h3 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h3 h4

f: flow

H8: forall b : A,
Fmap.update s1 f u, s2, h3, h2, R |= P b
s1, s2, h3, h2, R |= (∀ x : A, defun f u;; P x)

forall Q : postcond,
bientails (rs (ens r. Q r)) (ens r. Q r)


forall Q : postcond,

  applys red_rs_ens.
Qed.


forall (f : var) u (A : Type) (P : A -> flow),
defun f u;; (∃ x : A, P x) ⊑ ∃ x : A, defun f u;; P x

forall f1 f2, intersect f1 f2 ⊑ f1


forall f1 f2, intersect f1 f2 ⊑ f1

  
forall f1 f2 s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= intersect f1 f2 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1
 
f1, f2: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= intersect f1 f2
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1

  inverts* H.
Qed.


forall f1 f2, intersect f1 f2 ⊑ f2


forall f1 f2, intersect f1 f2 ⊑ f2

  
forall f1 f2 s1 s2 (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= intersect f1 f2 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2
 
f1, f2: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= intersect f1 f2
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2

  inverts* H.
Qed.
